trigger_examples: map our onboarding as a story; lay this flow onto a narrative arc; build a usage story; where's the arc in our experience
notes: Build a story-structured journey on the narrative arc — protagonist, goal, beats. Carries the story-map template.

trigger_examples: our experience feels flat; where do users drop in the story; find the broken beat; why is onboarding losing people
notes: Diagnose a flat or broken experience against the arc — missing beat, no climax, dead cliffhanger. Diagnosis in place — no template.

trigger_examples: help me tell our product's concept story; craft the origin story; pitch the experience vision; align the team on the narrative
notes: Craft a concept or origin story to align stakeholders or pitch. Carries the concept-story template.
